title: GAS ExecuteTask Request
description: Canonical request body for submitting a task to a Geospatial Agentic Service.

task.description: The user task and requested interaction mode.

instructions.description: Natural-language instructions describing what the agent should do.

mode.description: Interaction mode. sync waits for the final response, async returns a task_id immediately, and stream returns progress events followed by the final response.

inputs.description: Formal task inputs consumed by the agent.

input_datasets.description: Input dataset files. Each item may be a URL/path string or an encoded dataset object.

oneOf.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL or server-accessible path to a dataset.

outputs.description: Client preferences for generated outputs and artifact delivery.

artifact_delivery.description: How generated artifact files are represented inside the standard GAS response. URL returns downloadable links; Encoded embeds base64 content.

parameters.description: Execution parameters that affect how the agent runs.

model.description: Optional model name for this task. If omitted, the agent uses its default model.

requested_skill.description: Advanced optional hint for selecting a specific skill from the agent capability document. Most requests should omit this field and let the agent interpret the task instructions.

credentials.description: Runtime secrets supplied by the caller. Credential field names and requirements are agent-specific and should follow the selected agent's DescribeAgent document. OPENAI_API_KEY and GIBD_API_KEY are common fields used by the built-in example agents, but other agents may document different model-provider, local-model, or data-source credentials.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for agents that explicitly support OpenAI-backed execution.

GIBD_API_KEY.description: GIBD API key for agents that explicitly support the GIBD OpenAI-compatible access layer.

metadata.description: Optional client-side context for tracing, logging, reproducibility, or orchestration.

mime_type.description: Optional media type of the file.
